sections.paragraph:
ὦ - ō - o

Including the oblique forms, as well as ἦς ēs ace; ἦ ē ay, etc.; the subjunctive of G1510; (may, might, can, could, would, must, etc.; also with G1487 and its compounds, as well as with other particles) be: - + appear, are, (may, might, should) be, X have, is, + pass the flower of her age, should stand, were.
